metadata.description: Codebase exploration CLIs for AI coding agents: ny-codemap (survey files + top-level symbols) and ny-codegraph (find-refs / callers / callees / impact across Rust, TypeScript, TSX, JavaScript, Python).

plugins.name: ny-skills
plugins.description: Two tree-sitter-powered CLIs that return structured JSON tagged with confidence/reason so agents can prefer them over ad-hoc grep/find/rg/ls. Bundles ny-codemap (symbol survey) and ny-codegraph (semantic cross-references).
